title: The Khan Job
summary: Tom Bielefeld and Hassan Abbas review Der Physiker der Mullahs (The Mullah's Physicist), a film by Egmont R. Koch, broadcast on German Public Television (WDR) on February 22, 2007.
body: Tom Bielefeld and Hassan Abbas review Der Physiker der Mullahs ( The Mullah's Physicist ), a film by Egmont R. Koch, broadcast on German Public Television (WDR) on February 22, 2007.
